title: episki Framework Definition (Unified Controls + Recursive Tests)

source_url.description: Canonical public reference URL for the framework text.

effective_date.description: When this framework version became effective (ISO 8601 date).

retired_date.description: When this framework version was retired (ISO 8601 date).

category.description: High-level grouping (kept flexible because frameworks vary: e.g., 'financial', 'regulation', 'standard').

controls.description: Root control nodes for the framework.

mapping.description: Optional crosswalk mapping to another framework/control reference.

testNode.description: A recursive test/procedure node. Group nodes omit 'kind'. Leaf nodes may include 'kind' to indicate evidence/procedure type.

label.description: Human-readable procedure/test label. Keep it trimmed; don't store formatting whitespace as data.

kind.description: Evidence/procedure type. Omit for group nodes.

controlNode.description: A node in the framework control tree (chapter/domain/requirement/control). Titles may be absent for some frameworks.

label.description: Optional human-readable heading/title. Some frameworks may not provide distinct titles.

group.description: Optional flag indicating the node is a structural/grouping container rather than an enforceable requirement.

description.description: Optional narrative text for the control node (requirement statement, guidance, etc.).

source_url.description: Optional deep link to an authoritative source for this specific node.

tests.description: Optional test/procedure tree attached to this control node (e.g., PCI testing procedures).
